opportunities.title: Director, Technical Program Manager
opportunities.description: Build and lead Scale AI's TPM org from the ground up — team hiring, enterprise execution frameworks, cross-functional coordination between Engineering and Product leadership. Requires 10+ years TPM/engineering leadership, 4+ years people management. This is the foundational TPM leadership hire at one of the most consequential AI companies.

opportunities.title: Technical Program Manager, Databases
opportunities.description: Own roadmap execution for Anthropic's cross-region, multi-cloud database strategy. Manage external vendor relationships, drive dependencies and tradeoffs for critical infrastructure, facilitate technical decision-making across teams. Hybrid SF/Seattle. $365k–$435k.

opportunities.title: Director, AI Enablement
opportunities.description: Lead Headspace's AI adoption strategy and operating model — AI governance frameworks, vendor evaluation, portfolio oversight, and org-wide AI fluency programs. Reports to COO. Hybrid SF (3 days/week). $177k–$250k SF range.

opportunities.title: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026
opportunities.description: Major AI engineering conference covering enterprise AI strategy, technical leadership, systems architecture, and AI governance. Four days of sessions, networking, and demos. June 29–July 2 at Moscone West, San Francisco.

opportunities.title: AWS Agentic AI Summit — June Edition
opportunities.description: Partnership event featuring AWS, Saviynt, Deepgram, Zendesk, and 4Minds demoing production-ready agentic AI systems. Live demos, technical Q&A with industry practitioners. Free — register via AICamp.

opportunities.title: Federated Intelligence in Production — NVIDIA FLARE
opportunities.description: Technical talks on operationalizing federated learning across distributed infrastructure, with production case studies from healthcare, finance, and automotive. Speakers from Rhino Federated Computing Platform and NVIDIA. SVAI Hub, Menlo Park.
